films.title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
films.overview: Years after his father disowns his adopted brother for marrying a woman of lower social standing, a young man goes on a mission to reunite his family.

films.title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
films.overview: Per her mother's last wish, an 8 year old girl sets out to reunite her father with his college best friend who was in love with him.

films.title: My Name Is Khan
films.overview: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his condition and his race.

films.title: Kabhi Alvida Naa Kehna
films.overview: Dev and Maya are both married to different people. Settled into a life of domestic ritual, and convinced that they are happy in their respective relationships, they still yearn for something deeper and more meaningful, which is precisely what they find in each other.

films.title: Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani
films.overview: Gym-freak brat Rocky falls in love with Rani, who comes from a well-educated Bengali family. Being from polar opposite worlds, the two decide to switch their families to adjust to each other's cultures and backgrounds and to know if their marriage will survive. Rocky and Rani are trapped in a world where they are united by love but divided by families and the ultimate question is will they fit in?

films.title: Student Of The Year
films.overview: Several alumni reminisce about their final year at St. Theresa's College and the events that shaped their lives.

films.title: Bombay Talkies
films.overview: One hundred years of Hindi cinema is celebrated in four short stories showcasing the power of film.

films.title: Ae Dil Hai Mushkil
films.overview: Ayan falls in love with his soulmate, Alizeh, but she doesn’t reciprocate the feeling. Later, a relationship with Saba helps him realize Alizeh’s value in his life, irrespective of their relationship status.

films.title: Lust Stories
films.overview: An anthology of four stories that sheds light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman.

films.title: Ghost Stories
films.overview: An anthology of four short horror tales.
